title: Workspace lacks src/ files needed to execute approved gateway banner edit
summary: The approved proposal references src/gateway/terminal-ui.ts and src/gateway/server-v2.ts, but this workspace does not contain a src/ directory or package.json, so I cannot apply or build the change here.
details: I attempted to execute proposal prop_1773557968293_6da242 as approved. The requested target files were not present in the editable workspace: read_file on `src/gateway/terminal-ui.ts` and `src/gateway/server-v2.ts` failed, and `list_directory('.')` showed no `src/` tree or `package.json`. I confirmed the source exists only via the read-only `read_source` tool, which cannot modify files. Because of that, I cannot implement, build, or verify the approved change in this workspace. Best next action: run this approved proposal in the actual Prometheus code workspace that contains `src/` and `package.json`, or sync those files into the current workspace before re-running.
diffPreview: No diff applied: editable workspace is missing the proposal target files.
estimatedImpact: Unblocks correct execution once run in the real code workspace; avoids claiming a code change that was not actually applied.
executorPrompt: Re-run approved proposal prop_1773557968293_6da242 in the actual Prometheus repository workspace where src/gateway/terminal-ui.ts, src/gateway/server-v2.ts, and package.json are editable, then build and verify.
